Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: A foreboding pause takes over the conversation. Some kind of emotion quirks a muscle in her brow, but she keeps enough composure to stop the rest of it from showing.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: And then it's all negated when she lets a momentary snarl through. She doesn't maintain it long, though -- just enough to let you know that she highly dislikes you.

Line.Text: Her hand waves to the side as if that's where she threw her unvoiced thoughts away. The bark on her face contorts into that same semi-friendliness as before, though each proceeding word is infused with an undertone of... something.
